enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual morning vlog from Boulder while stoned, covering his recent weed purchase, ongoing work on his website, helping his mom organize her office, biking to work, and his habit of listening to one audiobook a day, including reflections on various authors he's been enjoying.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves the 'one audiobook a day' habit; finds it worthwhile even without deep retention
prefers simple raw food; finds prepared stuff tastes gross compared to fresh vegetables
half smart, but overly sarcastic and ridiculous in his treatment of ancient Jews
considers her a genuinely smart writer
excited about it but finds the end keeps receding; doesn't care how long it takes
